feat.name: Weakening Assault
feat.text: With a barrage of blows, you diminish an enemy's strength. Strike an enemy affected by your Taunt twice. If either Strike hits, the target is enfeebled 1 until the beginning of your next turn. If both Strikes hit, the target is enfeebled 3 instead.

traits.name: Guardian
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the guardian class.
